property.name: mapreduce.framework.name
property.description: The runtime framework for executing MapReduce jobs. One of: local, classic or yarn.

property.name: mapreduce.jobhistory.address
property.description: The address of the HistoryServer ipc interface.

property.name: mapreduce.jobhistory.webapp.address
property.description: The address of the HistoryServer web interface.

property.name: mapreduce.map.memory.mb
property.description: The amount of memory to request from the scheduler for each map task.

property.name: mapreduce.reduce.memory.mb
property.description: The amount of memory to request from the scheduler for each reduce task.
